verdict.summary: The round-1 ordering defect is resolved. Live base admission now occurs before comment retrieval and all round-budget processing, so both terminal needs-user and durable model-pin actions are unreachable for a retargeted or unresolved-base PR. The admitted base ref is validated as a safe atom and exact-matched to the repository's protected default branch, and the later compare probe uses that validated actual base rather than a permissive fallback. The new regression cases are non-vacuous: they reuse postures already shown to invoke each mutation-capable budget path on the default base, then change only base.ref and assert both zero helper calls and zero allocator claims. Keeping the check after a live-confirmed repair defuse is consistent with the explicit safety exception and does not weaken the admission gate.
